title: Artifact
description: Metadata schema for a single media artifact within a Dynamic Documentary Engine collection

collection_id.description: The collection this artifact belongs to

artifact_type.description: The media class of this artifact

enumDescriptions.A-roll: Synchronized audio and video — stands alone in the sequence
enumDescriptions.B-roll: Video only — must always be paired with an X-roll for audio
enumDescriptions.X-roll: Audio only — always layered over a B-roll clip, never placed alone

role.description: The functional role of this artifact in a generated film

enumDescriptions.opening: Always appears at the start of every generated film in this collection
enumDescriptions.closing: Always appears at the end of every generated film in this collection
enumDescriptions.body: Available for selection by the sequencing engine

file.description: File-level information for this artifact, including its source type and location

source_type.description: Where the media comes from. 'local' means a stored file on disk or an external drive. 'stream' means a live source such as a webcam RTSP or HLS feed. The assembler uses this field to determine how to pass the source to FFmpeg.

filename.description: The filename including extension. Required when source_type is 'local'. Omit when source_type is 'stream'.

stream_url.description: Full URL of the live stream. Required when source_type is 'stream'. Omit when source_type is 'local'. Supports RTSP, HLS (.m3u8), and HTTP direct streams.

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the artifact in seconds. For live stream artifacts, this is the number of seconds the assembler will capture from the stream for this slot.

has_video.description: Whether this artifact contains a video track. Always true for A-roll and B-roll. Always false for X-roll.

has_audio.description: Whether this artifact contains an audio track. Always true for A-roll and X-roll. Always false for B-roll.

resolution.description: Video resolution if applicable. Omit for audio-only X-roll artifacts.

copyright_cleared.description: Whether this artifact is cleared for use in the project

content.description: Descriptive metadata about the content of this artifact. These fields are for human reference and collection-design purposes. The sequencing engine uses them only for dissimilarity scoring — to maximise contrast between consecutive clips — never to enforce tonal matching, mood continuity, or emotional arcs.

title.description: Short human-readable title for this artifact

description.description: Longer description of what this artifact contains
description.example: Black and white footage of soldiers moving through a destroyed village, ambient sounds of distant artillery

theme.description: Thematic tags describing the subject matter. Used by the selector for dissimilarity scoring only — not for thematic matching.

mood.description: The dominant emotional tone of this artifact. Present for human reference and used by the selector as one dissimilarity dimension — the engine actively seeks mood contrast, not mood continuity.

pacing.description: The visual and editorial pacing of this artifact. Used by the selector as one dissimilarity dimension — the engine prefers pacing contrast between consecutive clips.

tags.description: Free-form keyword tags. Used by the selector for dissimilarity scoring — the engine prefers candidates with fewer overlapping tags with the previous clip.

dominant_colors.description: Dominant color palette — used by the Dyn UIS Engine for visual continuity

dominant_lines.description: Dominant compositional line direction — used by the Dyn UIS Engine and by the selector as a dissimilarity dimension.

sequencing.description: Rules and hints that guide the sequencing engine when selecting this artifact

can_repeat.description: Whether this artifact can appear more than once in a single generated film

min_gap_seconds.description: Minimum seconds that must pass before this artifact can be used again

must_follow.description: Artifact IDs that should precede this artifact when possible. For editorial/technical reasons specific to this collection — not for mood or tonal shaping.

must_not_follow.description: Artifact IDs that must never directly precede this artifact. A hard structural constraint — use only for genuine editorial or technical incompatibilities.

weight.description: Selection weight — higher values make this artifact more likely to be selected during weighted random selection. A frequency control tool only, with no emotional significance.

ai_enrichment.description: Metadata generated or validated by the Claude API

auto_tagged.description: Whether this artifact was auto-tagged by the Claude API

enrichment_date.description: Date the AI enrichment was last run

suggested_tags.description: Additional tags suggested by the Claude API

confidence_score.description: AI confidence in the metadata accuracy (0-1)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this artifact was added to the collection

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last metadata update
